title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Knee Swelling
description: Echinacea purpurea essential oils contains bioactive constituents like alkylamides, caffeic acid, and echinacoside. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and pain. Alkylamides, in particular, have been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, which contribute to knee swelling.
